arts.ttl: Gary Lineker 'reveals truth' about Ruud van Nistelrooy's appointment as Leicester boss
arts.sum: Gary Lineker has suggested that Ruud van Nistelrooy was not Leicester City's top pick to replace Steve Cooper as manager. Leicester had been associated with several candidates, including Van Nistelrooy, following their split with Cooper the previous weekend.

arts.ttl: Thomas Frank reveals whether Igor Thiago will start Brentford's Premier League clash with Leicester
arts.sum: Brentford head coach Thomas Frank reveals whether Igor Thiago will start Saturday's Premier League home clash with Leicester City.

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy's first words as Leicester manager after Man Utd hero lands new job
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy has been appointed as the new manager of Leicester City just weeks after he left Manchester United after a successful period as interim boss

arts.ttl: Gary Lineker reveals the truth behind Ruud van Nistelrooy's agreement with Leicester
arts.sum: Leicester have confirmed Ruud van Nistelrooy as their new manager - but Match of the Day host Gary Lineker has hinted that the Dutchman wasn't first on their list

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy breaks his silence after being named as Leicester's new manager just weeks after leaving Man United
arts.sum: The Dutchman will watch the Foxes' clash with Brentford on Saturday from the stands after signing a contract until 2027 to manage the Premier League strugglers.

arts.ttl: Top makes clear Ruud van Nistelrooy mission as Man United legend named new Leicester City boss
arts.sum: Leicester City chairman, Aiyawatt “Top” Srivaddhanaprabha is expecting great things of new manager Ruud van Nistelrooy . And outlining his expectations of the new man, the chairman told the club website : “It is my pleasure to welcome Ruud to Leicester City .

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy is appointed Leicester's new manager less than three weeks after leaving Man United - with the Dutchman set to watch Brentford clash from the stands
arts.sum: TOM COLLOMOSSE: Ruud van Nistelrooy will watch Leicester's clash with Brentford from the stands after signing a contract until 2027 to manage the Premier League strugglers.

arts.ttl: Brentford v Leicester: FPL team news + predicted line-ups
arts.sum: Team form, absentees and our predicted XIs The post Brentford v Leicester: FPL team news + predicted line-ups appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: Premier League: Predictions for all five games on Saturday
arts.sum: The Premier League reaches matchday 13 this weekend and Tom McGarry has collated our writers' best bets for all five games being played on Saturday.

arts.ttl: “Who do you think you are?” – Leicester City man has multiple critics in homeland, consistent action has been noticed
arts.sum: Leicester City defender Wout Faes needs to change his attitude and buck up his ideas, with pundits and analysts in Belgium less than impressed by the 26-year-old. Sporza cover a range of comments from analysts and pundits today, with the Leicester City defender not coming out looking well from it.
